title: vignea maritima
intro: Vignea maritima, also known as Sea Fennel, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sea Fennel include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting respiratory health. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and capsules, as well as being used in topical applications for skin and wound care.
